title: cache_key param ignored by single-secret backends: API surface confusion
description: Scenario: a user wraps EnvBackend in CachingStore and calls get('key1'), then get('key2') expecting two different env vars. Both calls return the same env var (the one in the URI). The cache keeps both values under different keys even though both came from the same source. CachingStore's cache_key semantics work correctly for future multi-secret backends but generate confusion and support issues for the current single-secret pattern. The public API contract will be hard to change without a breaking bump once v0.1 is released.
